languages.text: {n}Генетор Ферренц, сфокусировав на пациенте все многочисленные оптические импланты, шарит в его раскрытой черепной коробке тонким заостренным щупом. Хирургеон Мартинакс сжимает окровавленными перчатками инъектор с желтоватым раствором, содержимым которого он то и дело орошает розовое мозговое вещество.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Один их них, рослый, но сгорбленный механикус с множеством визоров на том, что когда-то было лицом, шарит внутри черепа пациента тонким паяльником. Второй — медикарий в длинных перчатках и халате, держит в руках блестящий скальпель и шприц с желтоватым раствором.{/n}

languages.text: {n}With each of his many ocular implants focused closely on the patient, Genetor Ferrenz is rooting around inside the man's open skull with a thin, sharp, probe-like instrument. Meanwhile, Chirurgeon Martinax's hands, clad in bloodstained gloves, are holding an injector of yellowish solution, which he administers into the patient's brain matter at regular intervals.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Генетор Ферренц, сфокусировав на пациенте все многочисленные оптические импланты, шарит в его раскрытой черепной коробке тонким заостренным щупом. Хирургеон Мартинакс сжимает окровавленными перчатками инъектор с желтоватым раствором, содержимым которого он то и дело орошает розовое мозговое вещество.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Genetor Ferrenz, his many ocular implants all focused on the patient, is rooting around inside the man's open skull with a thin and sharp probe-like instrument. Chirurgeon Martinax's hands, clad in bloodstained gloves, are holding an injector of yellowish solution, which he administers into the patient's brain matter at regular intervals.{/n}

{n}With each of his many ocular implants focused closely on the patient, Genetor Ferrenz is rooting around inside the man's open skull with a thin, sharp, probe-like instrument. Meanwhile, Chirurgeon Martinax's hands, clad in bloodstained gloves, are holding an injector of yellowish solution, which he administers into the patient's brain matter at regular intervals.{/n}

{n}One of the pair, a hunched Tech-Priest with an array of visors on his head, is rooting around inside the patient's skull with a thin instrument that looks like a soldering iron. The other, a medicae officer wearing long gloves and a chirurgeon's coat, holds a scalpel and a syringe of yellow solution.{/n}

{n}Genetor Ferrenz, his many ocular implants all focused on the patient, is rooting around inside the man's open skull with a thin and sharp probe-like instrument. Chirurgeon Martinax's hands, clad in bloodstained gloves, are holding an injector of yellowish solution, which he administers into the patient's brain matter at regular intervals.{/n}

{n}With each of his many ocular implants focused closely on the patient, Genetor Ferrenz is rooting around inside the man's open skull with a thin, sharp, probe-like instrument. Meanwhile, Chirurgeon Martinax's hands, clad in bloodstained gloves, are holding an injector of yellowish solution, which he administers into the patient's brain matter at regular intervals.{/n}

languages.text: {n}二人組のうち一人は、頭にいくつものバイザーを装着した背を丸めたテックプリーストで、はんだごてのような細い器具で患者の頭蓋の内側をまさぐっている。もう一人は、長い手袋と外科医の長衣を身に着けた医務官で、メスと黄色い溶液の入った注射器を手にしている。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}One of the pair, a hunched Tech-Priest with an array of visors on his head, is rooting around inside the patient's skull with a thin instrument that looks like a soldering iron. The other, a medicae officer wearing long gloves and a chirurgeon's coat, holds a scalpel and a syringe of yellow solution.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}二人組のうち一人は、頭にいくつものバイザーを装着した背を丸めたテックプリーストで、はんだごてのような細い器具で患者の頭蓋の内側をまさぐっている。もう一人は、長い手袋と外科医の長衣を身に着けた医務官で、メスと黄色い溶液の入った注射器を手にしている。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Ses nombreux implants oculaires tournés vers le patient, le genetor Ferrenz insère un instrument fin et pointu à l'intérieur de son crâne. Pendant ce temps, le chirurgeon Martinax tient un injecteur rempli d'une solution jaunâtre dans ses gants tachés de sang et administre une dose dans le cerveau du patient à intervalles réguliers.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}With each of his many ocular implants focused closely on the patient, Genetor Ferrenz is rooting around inside the man's open skull with a thin, sharp, probe-like instrument. Meanwhile, Chirurgeon Martinax's hands, clad in bloodstained gloves, are holding an injector of yellowish solution, which he administers into the patient's brain matter at regular intervals.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Ses nombreux implants oculaires tournés vers le patient, le genetor Ferrenz insère un instrument fin et pointu à l'intérieur de son crâne. Pendant ce temps, le chirurgeon Martinax tient un injecteur rempli d'une solution jaunâtre dans ses gants tachés de sang et administre une dose dans le cerveau du patient à intervalles réguliers.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Genetör Ferrenz; çok sayıdaki göz implantının her birini hastaya odaklamış hâlde, ince, keskin, sondaya benzer bir aletle adamın açık kafatasının içini kurcalıyor. Bu sırada Dirikesimci Martinax'ın kan lekeli eldivenlerle kaplı elleri, sarımtırak bir solüsyon enjektörü tutuyor ve bunu düzenli aralıklarla hastanın beyin maddesine enjekte ediyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}With each of his many ocular implants focused closely on the patient, Genetor Ferrenz is rooting around inside the man's open skull with a thin, sharp, probe-like instrument. Meanwhile, Chirurgeon Martinax's hands, clad in bloodstained gloves, are holding an injector of yellowish solution, which he administers into the patient's brain matter at regular intervals.{/n}

Bu sırada Dirikesimci Martinax'ın kan lekeli eldivenlerle kaplı elleri, sarımtırak bir solüsyon enjektörü tutuyor ve bunu düzenli aralıklarla hastanın beyin maddesine enjekte ediyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Generator Ferrenz richtet seine zahlreichen Okularimplantate auf den Patienten und hantiert mit einem dünnen und scharfen sondengleichen Instrument in dessen offenem Schädel. In der Zwischenzeit hält Chirurgeum Martinax einen Injektor mit einer geblichen Substanz in seiner blutverschmierten Hand, die er in regelmäßigen Intervallen in das Gehirn des Patienten injiziert.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}With each of his many ocular implants focused closely on the patient, Genetor Ferrenz is rooting around inside the man's open skull with a thin, sharp, probe-like instrument. Meanwhile, Chirurgeon Martinax's hands, clad in bloodstained gloves, are holding an injector of yellowish solution, which he administers into the patient's brain matter at regular intervals.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Generator Ferrenz richtet seine zahlreichen Okularimplantate auf den Patienten und hantiert mit einem dünnen und scharfen sondengleichen Instrument in dessen offenem Schädel. In der Zwischenzeit hält Chirurgeum Martinax einen Injektor mit einer geblichen Substanz in seiner blutverschmierten Hand, die er in regelmäßigen Intervallen in das Gehirn des Patienten injiziert.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Con todos sus implantes oculares fijos en el paciente, el genetor Ferrenz recorre el interior del cráneo del hombre con una especie de sonda. Mientras, el cirujano Martinax sujeta en sus manos ensangrentadas un inyector con una disolución amarillenta que administra con regularidad en el cerebro del paciente.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}With each of his many ocular implants focused closely on the patient, Genetor Ferrenz is rooting around inside the man's open skull with a thin, sharp, probe-like instrument. Meanwhile, Chirurgeon Martinax's hands, clad in bloodstained gloves, are holding an injector of yellowish solution, which he administers into the patient's brain matter at regular intervals.{/n}

Mientras, el cirujano Martinax sujeta en sus manos ensangrentadas un inyector con una disolución amarillenta que administra con regularidad en el cerebro del paciente.{/n}

languages.text: {n}基因士费伦茨的诸多光学植入物齐齐聚焦于病人，他正用一根细长尖锐的探针状器械，在病人敞开的头骨里探寻。与此同时，船医马丁纳克斯戴着沾满血渍的手套，手里握着一支装有淡黄色溶液的注射器，正按固定间隔将药液注入病人的脑组织中。{/n}
